calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Blocked Account Receipt
Off Calendar Jan-08-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Blocked Account Receipt
Off Calendar Jan-02-2013 Continued To Jan-08-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Espey Silverman for George Vornoff.

Ms. Espey stated that the blocked account is ready to be opened the moment they get a signed signature card, and that her Client has signed the card and mailed it before Christmas. Ms. Espey also explained that the delay was because the majority of the funds are in Merrill Lynch, that Merrill Lynch does not do blocked accounts and that they had to find a Bank that would open an account without her Client being present. The Court expressed its concerns and continued status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account to January 8, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Blocked Account Receipt
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Continued To Jan-02-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Carolyn Espey Silverman for George Vornoff.

Counsel addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to change of form of account into high risk investment that is not protected and placing funds into a blocked account including the checking account. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
